scripts.test:ott:view: npm run fx:build -- ott && node --test tests/test_ott_lab_view_browser.mjs
scripts.test:effect-presets: node --test tests/test_effect_preset_schema.mjs tests/test_effect_preset_state.mjs tests/test_effect_preset_contract.mjs tests/test_effect_state_contract.mjs tests/test_effect_preset_v2_schema.mjs tests/test_effect_preset_migrations.mjs tests/test_effect_snapshots.mjs tests/test_effect_snapshot_bank.mjs tests/test_seqfx_preset_adapter.mjs tests/test_standalone_effect_presets.mjs tests/test_standalone_effect_preset_hook_browser.mjs tests/test_effect_preset_bar_browser.mjs
scripts.warp:update-reference: npm run warp:fixtures:update-inputs && npm run warp:reference:update
scripts.test:cmajor:warp: npm run test:python:warp-alias && npm run test:desktop:ui && npm run test:shared:hooks && cmaj test --singleThread --sessionID=1 tests/cmajor_warp
scripts.test:cmajor:filter: npm run test:python:filter-stability && npm run test:desktop:ui && npm run test:shared:hooks && cmaj test --singleThread --sessionID=1 tests/cmajor_filter
